ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the provider */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the provider was established */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the provider's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the provider's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the provider's logo image */,
  "customer_service_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer service */,
  "customer_service_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider offering the plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Monthly price of the plan */,
  "download_speed" TEXT /* Download speed of the plan (e.g., 10 - 5,000 Mbps) */,
  "upload_speed" TEXT /* Upload speed of the plan (e.g., 10 - 5,000 Mbps) */,
  "internet_type" TEXT /* Type of internet connection (e.g., DSL, Fiber-optic, Cable, Satellite) */,
  "data_limit" TEXT /* Data limit of the plan (e.g., 100 GB, Unlimited) */,
  "contract_length" TEXT /* Length of the contract (e.g., 12 months, 24 months) */,
  "setup_fee" REAL /* One-time setup fee for the plan */,
  "promotional_details" TEXT /* Details of any promotions or discounts */,
  "availability" REAL /* Average availability of the plan (e.g., 77%) */,
  "is_unlimited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plan is unlimited */,
  "is_bundle" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plan is part of a bundle (e.g., internet + cable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plans_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (e.g., city, state) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* User's subscription status (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences (e.g., preferred internet type, price range) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* JSON string of search results for the query */,
  "search_duration" REAL /* Duration of the search in seconds */,
  "search_location" TEXT /* Location context for the search (e.g., New York, Los Angeles) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
